# PregnancyPal Documentation

> User documentation for PregnancyPal — a maternal wellness companion app with
> week-by-week pregnancy tracking, kick counter, contractions timer, personalized
> meal planning, appointment management, community by week-cohort, and reminders.
> Available as a web app, Android (in prep), iOS (in prep), and a companion browser
> extension. Built by Ahsan Mahmood.

## Key links

- App: https://pregnancypal.aoneahsan.com
- Docs site: https://pregnancypal-docs.aoneahsan.com
- Sitemap: https://pregnancypal-docs.aoneahsan.com/sitemap.xml
- Author: https://aoneahsan.com (Ahsan Mahmood)

## Getting started

- /docs/intro — Welcome and overview
- /docs/getting-started/installation — Open the app on web, Android, or iOS
- /docs/getting-started/sign-up — Create your account (email, Google, Apple)
- /docs/getting-started/onboarding — First-run setup (LMP, conditions, diet)
- /docs/getting-started/dashboard-tour — Find your way around after signing in

## About

- /docs/about/credits — About PregnancyPal, author attribution, and how to support

## Honest framing

PregnancyPal is a tracking and organization companion. It is NOT a substitute
for prenatal care, does NOT diagnose any condition, and does NOT replace
healthcare provider guidance. Always consult a qualified provider for medical
decisions.

## Content under construction

The following sections will be filled in across upcoming documentation
batches: pregnancy tracking deep dives, kick counter and contractions timer
guides, wellness modules (water, medications, eye breaks, posture, movement,
exercise, mood), diet & nutrition (meal planning, dietary restrictions,
nutrition targets, condition-aware plans), appointments, period & fertility,
community, notifications & reporting, account & settings, mobile-only flows,
browser extension, FAQ, troubleshooting, legal, and glossary.
